question: 어제 캠페인별 클릭률(CTR)을 내림차순으로 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click = true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY ctr DESC

question: 어제 모바일 기기의 총 노출 수는?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' AND device_type='mobile'

question: 어제 전환이 발생한 광고 수를 알려줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ad_id) AS converted_ads FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' AND is_conversion=true

question: 어제 캠페인별 전환율(CVR) 상위 5개를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cvr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY cvr DESC LIMIT 5

question: 오늘 광고주별 총 광고비를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(cost_per_impression) AS total_cost FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC

question: 오늘 클릭당 비용(CPC)이 가장 낮은 캠페인 TOP 5
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(cost_per_click) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpc FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY cpc ASC LIMIT 5

question: 어제 지역별 노출 수를 순위대로 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT delivery_region, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY delivery_region ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 오늘 데스크톱/모바일/태블릿 기기별 클릭 수를 비교해줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT device_type, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY clicks DESC

question: 어제 총 전환 매출은 얼마야?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' AND is_conversion=true

question: 오늘 시간대별 노출 수를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT hour, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

question: 오늘 플랫폼별 CTR을 비교해줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT platform, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY platform ORDER BY ctr DESC

question: 어제 전환 타입별 건수를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT conversion_type, COUNT(*) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY conversion_type ORDER BY conversions DESC

question: 오늘 광고 형식별 노출 수를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_format, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY ad_format ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 어제 캠페인별 ROAS(광고비 대비 매출)를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(conversion_value) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression), 0) AS roas FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY roas DESC

question: 이번 달 전체 캠페인별 총 노출 수를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) AS total_impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY total_impressions DESC

question: 어제 강남구 지역 클릭 수는?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' AND delivery_region='강남구'

question: 오늘 iOS 앱 플랫폼의 노출 수는?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' AND platform='app_ios'

question: 어제 구매(purchase) 전환 총 매출을 알려줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' AND is_conversion=true AND conversion_type='purchase'

question: 오늘 시간대별 클릭 수 추이를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT hour, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

question: 오늘 광고주별 전환당 비용(CPA)을 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(cost_per_impression) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpa FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY cpa ASC

question: 어제 전체 광고 노출수, 클릭수, 전환수, 클릭률(CTR)을 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}'

question: 오늘 각 캠페인별로 노출, 클릭, 전환, 전환율(CVR)을 상세 비교해줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cvr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 어제 음식 카테고리별 클릭률(CTR) 상위 10개를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT food_category, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY food_category ORDER BY ctr DESC LIMIT 10

question: 오늘 광고 위치별 클릭수와 전환수를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_position, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY ad_position ORDER BY clicks DESC

question: 어제 운영체제별 노출 수와 CTR을 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT os, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY os ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 클릭은 있지만 전환이 없는 캠페인 목록
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) > 0 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) = 0 ORDER BY clicks DESC

question: 오늘 광고주별 노출수, 총 광고비, 전환 매출, ROAS를 한 번에 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, COUNT(*) AS impressions, SUM(cost_per_impression) AS total_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) AS revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression), 0) AS roas FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY roas DESC

question: 어제 기기 타입과 플랫폼 조합별 노출 수를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT device_type, platform, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY device_type, platform ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 오전(00~11시)과 오후(12~23시) 클릭 수 비교
ground_truth_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(hour AS INT) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END AS time_period, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY CASE WHEN CAST(hour AS INT) < 12 THEN '오전' ELSE '오후' END ORDER BY time_period

question: 2026년 3월 14일 전환 타입별 총 매출과 평균 전환 가치
ground_truth_sql: SELECT conversion_type, COUNT(*) AS conversions, SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue, AVG(conversion_value) AS avg_value FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY conversion_type ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 검색 키워드별 클릭수 상위 10개
ground_truth_sql: SELECT keyword, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND keyword IS NOT NULL GROUP BY keyword ORDER BY clicks DESC LIMIT 10

question: 2026년 3월 14일 가게별 전환 매출 상위 5개
ground_truth_sql: SELECT store_id, SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY store_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: 오늘 지역별 노출수, CTR, 전환수를 한 번에 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT delivery_region, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY delivery_region ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 어제 광고 형식별 CTR과 CVR을 비교해줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_format, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cvr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='{{ y_year }}' AND month='{{ y_month }}' AND day='{{ y_day }}' GROUP BY ad_format ORDER BY ctr DESC

question: 오늘 시간대별 노출 수와 클릭수 추이를 보여줘
ground_truth_sql: SELECT hour, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='{{ year }}' AND month='{{ month }}' AND day='{{ day }}' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 일별 impression 수 추이
ground_truth_sql: SELECT day, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 일별 클릭수와 CTR 추이
ground_truth_sql: SELECT day, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 캠페인별 총 impression 합계
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) AS total_impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY total_impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 기기 타입별 일별 클릭 수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT day, device_type, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY day, device_type ORDER BY day, clicks DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 광고주별 총 전환 매출
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 플랫폼별 impression 합계
ground_truth_sql: SELECT platform, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY platform ORDER BY impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 광고 형식별 클릭수 합계
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_format, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY ad_format ORDER BY clicks DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 전환 타입별 총 매출
ground_truth_sql: SELECT conversion_type, SUM(conversion_value) AS total_revenue FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') AND is_conversion=true GROUP BY conversion_type ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 캠페인별 일별 평균 CTR
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, AVG(daily_ctr) AS avg_ctr FROM (SELECT day, campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS daily_ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY day, campaign_id) sub GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY avg_ctr DESC

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 지역별 전환수 합계
ground_truth_sql: SELECT delivery_region, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY delivery_region ORDER BY conversions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 전체 광고 노출수, 클릭수, 전환수, CTR 요약
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03'

question: 2026년 3월 캠페인별 전환수 순위 TOP 20
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY conversions DESC LIMIT 20

ground_truth_sql: SELECT device_type, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY device_type ORDER BY impressions DESC

ground_truth_sql: SELECT day, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

question: 2026년 3월 음식 카테고리별 노출수와 전환수 상위 10개
ground_truth_sql: SELECT food_category, COUNT(*) AS impressions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY food_category ORDER BY conversions DESC LIMIT 10

question: 2026년 3월 광고주별 ROAS 순위
ground_truth_sql: SELECT advertiser_id, SUM(conversion_value) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression), 0) AS roas FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY advertiser_id ORDER BY roas DESC

question: 2026년 3월 플랫폼별 일별 impression 추이
ground_truth_sql: SELECT day, platform, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY day, platform ORDER BY day, impressions DESC

question: 2026년 3월 OS별 클릭수와 전환수
ground_truth_sql: SELECT os, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) AS clicks, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) AS conversions FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY os ORDER BY clicks DESC

question: 2026년 3월 광고 위치별 전환율(CVR)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_position, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cvr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY ad_position ORDER BY cvr DESC

question: 2026년 3월 전체 시간대별 총 impression 합계 (hourly 테이블 기준)
ground_truth_sql: SELECT hour, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

question: 2026년 3월 14일 전체 평균 CTR보다 높은 캠페인 목록
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) > (SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14') ORDER BY ctr DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 impression이 가장 많은 피크 시간대
ground_truth_sql: SELECT hour, COUNT(*) AS impressions FROM ad_combined_log WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY impressions DESC LIMIT 1

question: 2026년 3월 14일 CTR 상위 10개 캠페인의 광고 형식 분포
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ad_format, COUNT(*) AS campaign_count FROM (SELECT campaign_id, ad_format, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_click=true THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS ctr FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' GROUP BY campaign_id, ad_format ORDER BY ctr DESC LIMIT 10) top_campaigns GROUP BY ad_format ORDER BY campaign_count DESC

question: 2026년 3월 14일 purchase 전환이 발생한 캠페인의 평균 CPA
ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(cpa) AS avg_cpa FROM (SELECT campaign_id, SUM(cost_per_impression) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN 1 END), 0) AS cpa FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND campaign_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT campaign_id FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day='14' AND is_conversion=true AND conversion_type='purchase') GROUP BY campaign_id) sub

question: 2026년 3월 8일부터 14일까지 7일간 캠페인별 전환 매출 합계와 총 광고비 합계, ROAS
ground_truth_sql: SELECT campaign_id, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue, SUM(cost_per_impression) AS total_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN is_conversion=true THEN conversion_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(cost_per_impression), 0) AS roas FROM ad_combined_log_summary WHERE year='2026' AND month='03' AND day IN ('08','09','10','11','12','13','14') GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY roas DESC
